steps.title: Spot the conditional test
steps.content: The strongest clue is that many narwhals lack a tusk. Laidre sets up a logical test: if the tusk truly serves an important purpose, then what should we expect about how common it would be in the population?

steps.title: Match the logical conclusion
steps.content: An important survival trait would be favored by natural selection, so if the tusk truly serves this purpose, more narwhals would have one. The other choices describe unrelated consequences or concern different species. That matches choice C — C is correct.
